summary: Completed CRM Prospects testing. Found and fixed 2 bugs: 1) Frontend sending empty strings instead of null for optional enum fields causing 422 validation errors; 2) Backend search endpoint crashing when email/phone is null. All 20 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI tested: Kanban board, Lista view, Create lead, Search filtering.

issues: Minor: Modal shows 'Warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby' console warnings - accessibility improvement suggested

passed_tests: POST /api/crm/leads - Create lead with all fields (200)
POST /api/crm/leads - Create lead with minimal data (200)
PUT /api/crm/leads/{id}/move - Move lead to ganho with sale_value (200)
PUT /api/crm/leads/{id}/move - Move lead to perdido with lost_reason (200)
UI - CRM page loads with Kanban board (5 stages)
UI - Dashboard cards show metrics (Total Leads, Conversão, Valor, Conversões)
UI - Create lead modal opens and submits
UI - Lista view shows table with all columns

bugs_fixed.issue: Frontend sending empty strings for optional enum fields (origin, priority) causing 422 validation errors
bugs_fixed.fix: Convert empty strings to null before sending payload. Also fixed error handling to properly display Pydantic validation errors as toast messages.

bugs_fixed.issue: Search endpoint crashing with AttributeError when email/phone is None
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed l.get('email', '').lower() to (l.get('email') or '').lower() to handle None values

critical_code_review_comments: Backend CRM routes are well-structured with proper CRUD operations
Pipeline stages (novo, contato, negociacao, ganho, perdido) correctly implemented
Activities and Tasks associations working correctly
Dashboard metrics include all requested KPIs: Total Leads, Conversão Rate, Valor do Mês, Conversões do Mês
Drag-and-drop logic for Kanban properly triggers move modals for ganho/perdido stages
seed_data_creation: Used existing licensee user (licenciado@teste.com). Created test leads during testing (TEST_ prefix, cleaned up by pytest fixtures).
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM Prospects feature fully tested. All CRUD operations work. Pipeline with 5 stages (novo, contato, negociacao, ganho, perdido). Kanban drag-drop and Lista view working. Dashboard metrics showing. Test user: licenciado@teste.com / senha123. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_crm.py with 20 comprehensive tests covering leads CRUD, pipeline movement, dashboard, search, activities and tasks.

rca_of_issues.root_cause: Frontend form spreading all formData including empty strings for optional enum fields (origin). Pydantic enum validation rejects empty string as invalid enum value.
rca_of_issues.reproduction: Create lead form, leave Origin field empty, submit → 422 Unprocessable Entity
rca_of_issues.mitigation: Convert empty strings to null for all optional fields before API call

rca_of_issues.root_cause: Backend search filter doing .lower() on potentially None values for email/phone fields
rca_of_issues.reproduction: Create lead without email, then search for any term → 500 Internal Server Error
rca_of_issues.mitigation: Use (value or '') pattern to handle None before calling string methods
